value: Master Asia, Undefeated of the East
Master Asia, Undefeated of the East
Master Asia, Undefeated of the East

A boy from Side 7 who loves nothing more than playing with machines.
He accidentally came across a manual during the Zeon attack, and used it to pilot the Federation Forces' new MS Gundam. He's continued to pilot ever since.
At the beginning he became part of the White Base Corps against his will and found it difficult to fight, causing friction with White Base captain Bright Noa, and occasionally even refusing to go into battle. 
But after more experience in the battlefield, he matured as a soldier and as a person. 
This accelerated his awakening as a Newtype, and he used his powers to become an ace pilot and the center of the Federation's "Gundam legend."

A boy who became a refugee after Zeon's attack on SIDE 7, and escaped aboard the Federation Forces warship White Base.
He is an opportunist and a sarcastic person, with a philosophical yet twisted outlook on the world. He made few friends in the beginning, but started to feel like part of the White Base team as he continued to fight and found meaning to his battles.
He was a machine gunner at first, but was later assigned to pilot the Guncannon because he had a heavy vehicle license.

A boy who became a refugee after Zeon's attack on SIDE 7, and escaped aboard the Federation Forces warship White Base.
He is serious, responsible, and cooperative, but harbors a strong dislike for Amuro Ray (whose father was in the military) because he was forced to abandon his home so the military could build a base. 
He joined the White Base Corps as a Guntank gunner to compete with Amuro, who was becoming a skilled Gundam pilot.
However, he realized that his abilities were no match for Amuro's talent, and has nursed worries over his own worth ever since.
While originally a Guntank pilot, he later changed to piloting the Guncannon.

A girl who became a refugee after Zeon's attack on SIDE 7, and escaped aboard the Federation Forces warship White Base.
She has worked as a medic and communications officer for the White Base ever since.
She is actually the daughter of Zeon Zum Deikun, the founder of the Republic of Zeon, and her real name is Artesia Som Deikun. Her brother is Zeon ace pilot Char Aznable, which adds further complications.
She is intellectual yet bold in her actions, and shows signs of Newtype ability. Because of this, she was chosen as the pilot for the Core Booster.

The only pilot cadet out of all of the White Base's original crew to survive the Zeon attack on SIDE 7.
He has an open personality and is popular among his comrades, who rely on him like a big brother, and he is able to lead the inexperienced White Base Corps.
He mainly serves as a Core Fighter pilot, but sometimes operates the Guntank as well.

A veteran Federation Forces soldier who is assigned to the White Base Corps.
 He has a frivolous and flirtatious manner, but is a skilled pilot. He mainly pilots the Core Booster, but on occasion he serves as a gunner for the White Base's main cannon.
He is pretty much the only adult in the team, giving him an elder's perspective and poise. 
This earns him the trust and respect of the crew, and even the heart of White Base navigator Mirai Yashima.

An officer cadet who was made captain of the Federation Forces warship White Base after the Zeon attack on SIDE 7 wiped out most of its crew.
He is a responsible, duty-driven man who leads the White Base's inexperienced crew with a strict, firm hand. He is completely unafraid of giving unpopular orders.
He is especially tough on the Gundam pilot Amuro Ray, who he can tell has great potential.
Eventually he matures into a good leader and gradually builds a trusting relationship with the rest of the crew, as they fight and survive vicious battles.

A pet robot that Amuro Ray, a boy from SIDE 7, gave to his childhood friend, Fraw Bow.
It has a round body and moves via rolling, but it can use its arms and legs to climb stairs.
It's also capable of simple conversation as well as brainwave monitoring.
It was kept as a pet by Kikka Kitamoto and other SIDE 7 refugee orphans in the White Base.

A Zeon ace pilot feared by the Federation Forces as the "The Red Comet." He is the son of Zeon Zum Deikun, founder of the Republic of Zeon, and his real name is Casval Rem Deikun.
Certain that his father was assassinated by the Zabi family, he vows revenge, disguising hiMSelf behind a mask and joining the Zeon military.
He is an accomplished mobile suit pilot with many victories under his belt, and a capable and inspiring commander.
Initially, he had planned to use his military career to get revenge against the Zabi family, but his interests gradually shift towards the Newtype reformation of humanity.

A Zeon ace pilot feared by the Federation Forces as the "The Red Comet." He is the son of Zeon Zum Deikun, founder of the Republic of Zeon, and his real name is Casval Rem Deikun.
Certain that his father was assassinated by the Zabi family, he vows revenge, disguising himself behind a mask and joining the Zeon military.
He is an accomplished mobile suit pilot with many victories under his belt, and a capable and inspiring commander.
Initially, he had planned to use his military career to get revenge against the Zabi family, but his interests gradually shift towards the Newtype reformation of humanity.

A war orphan who was scouted by the Zeon ace pilot Char Aznable for her Newtype abilities and trained by the Flanagan Agency. When she pilots the prototype Newtype mobile armor Elmeth, her exceptional Newtype abilities enable her to surpass even veteran pilots.
She appears to have loyalty and love for her savior Char,but after her meeting with Federation Forces MS pilot Amuro Ray at Side 6, she feels drawn to him because they share similar powers. 
She has a profound effect on the awakening of Char and Amuro's Newtype abilities, and leaves a searing scar on the two lifelong rivals.

A Zeon MS pilot who is assigned by his superior, Char Aznable, to conduct reconnaissance on the Federation Forces MS development plan known as Operation V.
He serves as leader of the reconnaissance team that enters SIDE 7.
As a leader, he is considerate of others and makes calm decisions, but is unable to control the renegade Gene.

A mobile suit pilot for the Principality of Zeon.
He was one of the mobile suit pilots who participated in the reconnaissance mission on Side 7.
On Denim's orders, he delivered intel on the Federation Forces' Operation V to Char, but he was killed in action during his second sortie.

A Zeon MS pilot who is assigned by his superior, Char Aznable, to conduct reconnaissance on the Federation Forces MS development plan known as Operation V.
A recent recruit, he is impatient with his lack of progress, and aims to quickly move up in the ranks just as Char did.
A sergeant-ranked MS pilot of Zeon and a member of the Mad Angler Squadron. Piloting the amphibious prototype Zock, he participated in the operation to raid the Earth Federation headquarters, Jaburo.

A commando assigned to Zeon's Mad Angler submarine intelligence corps. Each member of this team is capable of carrying out difficult missions, and he is skilled at MS piloting as well as more general skills such as information gathering and handling explosives.
He joined the invasion of the Federation Forces' Jaburo headquarters as an expert in explosives. The name "Akahana" was given to him as a code name, and is not his real name.

Commander of the Ramba Ral Team, a special forces unit that reports directly to Dozle Zabi, the commander of Zeon's Space Strike Fleet. He is a Veteran professional soldier who is also known as the "Blue Giant."
He is the son of Jimba Ral, a contributor to the foundation of the Republic of Zeon, and a self-styled specialist in guerrilla tactics. He also has first-class skills as a mobile suit pilot and as a commander. 
He believes that his success will help secure the safety of his subordinates, and therefore takes on difficult missions and heads to the front lines aboard his personal MS Gouf.

This strong woman is the lover of the "Blue Giant," Ramba Ral.
She comes from a civilian background, but fights alongside Ral as a staff member of the Ramba Ral Team, a special forces unit that reports directly to Dozle Zabi, the commander of Zeon's Space Strike Fleet.
She is trusted by other soldiers for her talents.

The commander of the cruiser Chivvay, Dozle tasked him with exposing Char's incompetence.
He sent out twelve Rick Doms in an attempt to sink the White Base, but they were quickly dispatched by the Gundam.

Commander of Zeon's Odessa forces, and a confidant of Kycilia Zabi, the commander of the Armored Assault Force.
He is in charge of mining mineral resources on Earth.
He is a schemer and cunning tactician, but because of his cold and calculating personality, he is apparently unpopular with other soldiers.
Because of his skill at bureaucratic procedures, he also works with logistics and supplies, and has even helped MS development by proposing a United Maintenance Plan to address inefficiencies in production and development.
He is an avid collector of ceramics, and pursues this passion on Earth in addition to his duties.

A mobile suit pilot who leads the "Black Tri-Stars," a special forces team attached to the 1st MS Battalion of the Armored Assault Force's 7th Division, which reports directly to Kycilia Zabi.
He has been an active soldier since the start of the One Year War, and uses the high-speed combination attack known as the "Jet Stream Attack" with his fellow Tri-Stars, earning a shining reputation for them all.

A member of the "Black Tri-Stars," a special forces team attached to the 1st MS Battalion of the Armored Assault Force's 7th Division, which reports directly to Kycilia Zabi.
He has been an active soldier since the start of the One Year War, and uses the high-speed combination attack known as the "Jet Stream Attack" with his fellow Tri-Stars, earning a shining reputation for them all.

A member of the "Black Tri-Stars," a special forces team attached to the 1st MS Battalion of the Armored Assault Force's 7th Division, which reports directly to Kycilia Zabi.
He has been an active soldier since the start of the One Year War, and uses the high-speed combination attack known as the "Jet Stream Attack" with his fellow Tri-Stars, earning a shining reputation for them all.

Eldest son of Degwin Sodo Zabi, the sovereign of the Principality of Zeon. He is the supreme commander of the Zeon military, and the true leader of the Principality.
He is also the dictator who started the War of Zeon Independence, better known as the One Year War.
He has an IQ of 240, and uses his supernatural talents to govern the country and military, showing cold judgment and high charisma. He is an ambitious man who lets nothing stand in his way. Acting on the elitism of his theory of the "survival of the fittest," he declared war on the Earth Federation government, using Spacenoid autonomy as a cause.

Third son of of Degwin Sodo Zabi, the sovereign of the Principality of Zeon. He is the commander of Zeon's Space Strike Fleet, but despite his large frame and fierce demeanor he is a good soldier with the ability to assess situations and take the well-being of all his soldiers into account.
Unlike his siblings, he has no interest in politics and prefers to put himself on the battlefield. 
He has earned the trust of other soldiers, and takes great care of his wife Zenna and his daughter Mineva Lao Zabi.

Eldest daughter of of Degwin Sodo Zabi, the sovereign of the Principality of Zeon. She is the commander of Zeon's Armored Assault Force, and a brilliant strategist who oversaw and managed the logistics for the invasion of Earth. 
She is more politician than soldier, and excels at manipulating political situations.
She recognized the importance of Newtypes and expedited the foundation of the Flanagan Agency to compete with her brother Gihren. 
She even brought in ace pilot Char "Red Comet" Aznable to lead her Newtype Corps, although he had been demoted after being blamed for the death of her brother Garma. 
By taking control of areas beyond her brother Gihren's reach, she consolidated her power and expanded her political influence.

Fourth son of of Degwin Sodo Zabi, the sovereign of the Principality of Zeon. He was the commander of Zeon's Earth Occupation Force and was Very popular among the citizens.
Because of his good upbringing, he had an honest personality and was revered by the people as a kind and sincere prince.
He disliked that his family helped him get his position, and was always looking for chances to prove himself.
The ace pilot Char Aznable, the "Red Comet," was an academy friend of his, and he takes over Char's pursuit of the Federation Forces warship White Base.

An ace pilot for the Principality of Zeon.
He was promoted two ranks to major for his accomplishments in the Clash at Loum, where he earned the nickname The Red Comet.
Under Vice Admiral Dozle's orders, he undertook a mission to stop the Earth Federation Forces from carrying out Operation V.
His true identity was Casval, the orphan son of the Deikuns, who swore revenge on the Zabi family.

An ace pilot of Zeon's Space Strike Fleet. Thanks to his accomplishments in the Battle of Loum, he was famed and dreaded as the "White Wolf."
Eldest son of the Matsunaga family, and a warrior with passion and valor, he was attached like a brother to Dozle Zabi, commander of the Space Strike Fleet.

Commander of the ace unit known as the Chimaira Corps, which reports directly to Kycilia Zabi, the commander of Zeon's Armored Assault Force. He is also known as the "Crimson Lightning."
In a sea of uptight Zeon soldiers, he is a bright and happy character who enjoys popularity among the people and is trusted by his fellow Chimaira Corps members.
Because his personal mobile suits have a similar coloring to those of the ace pilot Char Aznable, the "Red Comet," his machines are often mistaken for Char's on the battlefield.

A technical officer in Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit, he is a young engineer who joined after graduating university, three months before the One Year War.
His pure heart is unsuited to the battlefield, and he believes that technology can save the future. 
He has a great deal of respect for machines and their creators.
He can also be serious and inflexible, and is often called a "technology nerd" because of his absolute passion for mechanical devices and their development.

A technical officer in Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit, he is a young engineer who joined after graduating university, three months before the One Year War.
His pure heart is unsuited to the battlefield, and he believes that technology can save the future. 
He has a great deal of respect for machines and their creators.
He can also be serious and inflexible, and is often called a "technology nerd" because of his absolute passion for mechanical devices and their development.

An elite female officer assigned to the Peenemunde Agency, under the direct command of Zeon leader Gihren Zabi. 
She was sent as a watchdog for the 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit.
She comes from a good family and is held in high standing, harsh in her speech but loyal to her duties. Many resent her for this, but she pays them no heed as she carries on with her job.

A member of Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit, he is a young soldier hired to test-pilot various new weaponry. 
He used to work on the same project as his comrade, Oliver May.
Because of his happy, laid-back personality, he is sometimes seen as lacking seriousness, but he is highly sensitive to the needs of others, and always puts himself second in order to keep spirits light.
He'd longed to become an MS pilot, but had a difficult time getting accepted. 
When the Zudah is deployed to the 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit, he cannot contain his joy at being able to pilot it.

Captain of the test support ship Jotunheim, of Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit. 
He is a trueborn sailor who has captained the ship from its days as a passenger ship 20 years ago. 
His ship's safety always comes first, and he has cool judgment despite the scratch team he has to work with.
He has known the crew since the ship's days as a passenger vessel, and he trusts their abilities.

Chief gunner aboard the test support ship Jotunheim, of Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit. 
He is an old-school soldier who believes that artillery is at the heart of all fleet warfare.
Because he is a cannon expert he has the utmost confidence in his skills and experience, and he was chosen as a gunner for the 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit's first assignment, the testing of the prototype cannon Jormungand.

A tank soldier assigned to Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit for the reevaluation of the prototype weapon Hildolfr.
He was an excellent tank soldier and instructor, but when trends shifted to the mobile suit, he failed the MS aptitude test and fell into despair.
He was later assigned to the 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit to operate the Hildolfr, and although the test was a complete sham, he believed it was his chance for a comeback.
He put all his skills into operating the Hildolfr to its highest potential, and tried to win back his status.

A soldier assigned to Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit for the evaluation of the new mobile suit Zudah.
He was originally involved with the development of the Zudah as a Zimmad test pilot, but he was humiliated when the Zudah was defeated in competition by Zeonic's Zaku I.
He decided to clear the Zudah's name, and took on an assignment with the 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit because of his passionate belief in the machine he had helped to develop and test.

Commander of the Semovente Corps, a Federation special forces unit that uses captured Zeon mobile suits. 
Formerly a tank officer, his infantry training translated to significant mobile suit piloting skills. Using a captured Zaku II, he attacks Zeon bases disguised as an ally.

A marine transferred to Zeon's 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit. 
He is tasked with using Zeon's prototype mobile diver system to intercept warships launching into space from the Federation's Jaburo headquarters.
He was greatly affected by the "Man of the Sea" lifestyle exemplified by his grandfather, and wishes to live this way himself. 
This gives him a haughty attitude that grates against those around him, but he is an excellent pilot and a key figure in the operation of the mobile diver system.
Although skilled, he often gets excited in the cockpit and yells strange war cries, to the dismay of the Jotunheim crew.

Commander of Zeon's Kuspen Combat Battalion.
He is a career soldier who incorporates the 603rd Technical Evaluation Unit into his own battalion and assumes control aboard the Jotunheim.
His oppressive and outrageous actions are misinterpreted by many, but he is a direct person who has great affection for his subordinates and allies. 
He is a noble soldier who fights for his country with valor.
He is also an exceptional commander with a broad perspective and calm, almost unemotional judgment.
He lost his left arm in a previous battle, and in times of high emotion he has a tendency to reach for it.

A student soldier assigned to Zeon's Kuspen Combat Battalion. 
He is a brave young man who volunteered to protect his country. He is also the brother of Monique Cadillac, of the Peenemunde Agency that reports directly to Zeon leader Gihren Zabi.
He has a pure-hearted kindness and wants to protect his family and country, but believes strongly in his mission,  risking his life as a pilot of the mobile pod Oggo.
Even though he's had limited training, he has high aptitude as a pilot, and is the most talented out of all the young soldiers assigned to the battalion.

A Federation Forces MS pilot assigned to the 08th MS Team of the Federation Ground Force's Far Eastern Mechanized Composite Battalion, as a replacement for a predecessor who suffered a nervous breakdown.
He has a bitter past in which he failed to protect his family from the Zeon poison gas attack on Side 2, and thus prioritizes his friends' lives above all else, but this makes others consider him a weak and inexperienced leader.
Even so, he continues to hold tight to his morals and shows flexibility and tactical skill by befriending guerrilla soldiers, eventually winning the trust of his comrades.
He met Aina Sakhalin, a female officer of the Zeon forces, in a battlefield in space. After confirming their feelings for each other he starts to question the reasoning behind war, where two people in love can kill each other.
He then faces a great challenge, as he starts to find meaning in his battles while questioning the true nature of love.

A Federation Forces MS pilot assigned to the 08th MS Team of the Federation Ground Force's Far Eastern Mechanized Composite Battalion, as a replacement for a predecessor who suffered a nervous breakdown.
He has a bitter past in which he failed to protect his family from the Zeon poison gas attack on Side 2, and thus prioritizes his friends' lives above all else, but this makes others consider him a weak and inexperienced leader.
Even so, he continues to hold tight to his morals and shows flexibility and tactical skill by befriending guerrilla soldiers, eventually winning the trust of his comrades.
He met Aina Sakhalin, a female officer of the Zeon forces, in a battlefield in space. After confirming their feelings for each other he starts to question the reasoning behind war, where two people in love can kill each other.
He then faces a great challenge, as he starts to find meaning in his battles while questioning the true nature of love.

A Federation Forces MS pilot assigned to the 08th MS Team of the Federation Ground Force's Far Eastern Mechanized Composite Battalion.
She has better piloting skills than her newly appointed team leader Shiro Amada.
She exhibits cool judgment on the battlefield, no matter how desperate the situation.
Her usual attitude is that of a true soldier, but because of her extensive experience she finds Shiro Amada's idealism unsuited to the battlefield and struggles to respect him, although she does follow his orders.
However, she eventually starts to recognize him as a leader for his direct personality and ever-improving abilities.
It is also obvious from her caring for others that she is a kind-hearted woman despite her ferocious fighting skills.
She used to be a medical student, and became a widow when her military doctor husband died.

A Federation Forces MS pilot assigned to the 08th MS Team of the Federation Ground Force's Far Eastern Mechanized Composite Battalion along with Shiro Amada.
Despite his large frame and fierce expression, he has a serious and loyal personality.
He is valued as a veteran ace pilot of the Federation Forces, but he has a dark past because all the teams he's joined were annihilated on their third sortie, save for him.
He is teased by others and called "Sanders the Reaper," and has become very superstitious.
In a space battle before he was assigned to the 08th MS Team he was saved by Shiro Amada, who boarded a Ball Type K and came to his rescue.
He has been one of the few who understood and trusted Shiro ever since.

A Federation Forces MS pilot assigned to the 08th MS Team of the Federation Ground Force's Far Eastern Mechanized Composite Battalion along with Shiro Amada.
Despite his large frame and fierce expression, he has a serious and loyal personality.
He is valued as a veteran ace pilot of the Federation Forces, but he has a dark past because all the teams he's joined were annihilated on their third sortie, save for him.
He is teased by others and called "Sanders the Reaper," and has become very superstitious.
In a space battle before he was assigned to the 08th MS Team he was saved by Shiro Amada, who boarded a Ball Type K and came to his rescue.
He has been one of the few who understood and trusted Shiro ever since.

A Hover Truck driver and sonar officer assigned to the 08th MS Team of the Federation Ground Force's Far Eastern Mechanized Composite Battalion.
His keen sense of hearing enables him to detect the enemy via sonar. He uses this skill to provide accurate analysis, playing a vital role within the team.
He has an anarchic, flirtatious, and highly unprofessional personality, and his antics are thought to have contributed to the nervous breakdown of his previous team leader.
He was slow to warm to new team leader Shiro Amada, and used to respond to his idealism with sarcasm, but as they continued to fight together, he learned to trust him.
Before he joined the military, he was a musician, and would request his own songs to radio shows in an attempt to publicize his work.
Despite his general boldness he does have a few secrets, namely his extreme claustrophobia and his feelings for Karen Joshua.

A new recruit who is assigned to the 08th MS Team of the Federation Ground Force's Far Eastern Mechanized Composite Battalion along with Shiro Amada.
His personality is far from enthusiastic, and when he opens his mouth, only complaints come forth. This makes him unpopular with the others, but he likes to think that he is being "realistic."
He used to feel negatively towards Shiro Amada's recklessness, and this often caused friction between them.
But after watching the ever-hopeful Shiro stick to his ideals, he slowly starts to soften towards him and even begins to respect him as a leader.
He operated the 08th MS Team's Hover Truck along with Eledore Mathis, serving as a driver and gunner.
His inexperience caused a lot of trouble at first, but with experience and the help of others he began to develop into a good soldier.

Born into Zeon's noble Sakhalin family, she is the sister of Zeon's Technical Rear Admiral Ginius Sakhalin, and supports him as a test pilot for the prototype mobile armor Apsaras.
She is a civilian without an official rank, but her energy and kindness gave her many loyal followers within the Zeon forces.
She has a nobility that suits her upbringing, and fights with determination against the Federation Forces, but upon meeting the Federation officer Shiro Amada she is drawn to his sincerity.
She then starts to question war and the life she has lived as a puppet to her brother.
After meeting Shiro again on the battlefield, she starts to face her own internal war.

Current head of Zeon's noble Sakhalin family.
He is working hard to resurrect his fallen family name as a Technical Rear Admiral in the Zeon forces, pursuing the development of the prototype mobile armor Apsaras.
He is in poor physical condition due to a debilitating childhood illness, and takes medicine regularly.
This has made him completely reliant on his sister Aina Sakhalin to look after him and test the Apsaras.
This gradually wore his psyche down, and he became obsessed with the Apsaras project.
As a result, he's turned into a cold man, prepared to sacrifice anything for the completion of his project, eventually locking out even his own sister.

An ace pilot of the Zeon forces who has sworn loyalty to the noble Sakhalin family.
He is in charge of defending the development base and other military duties while Ginius Sakhalin focuses on the development of his prototype mobile armor Apsaras.
He is a veteran soldier who has won the trust of others through his dedication.
Rather than a blind zealot, he is more like a samurai, taking his loyalty incredibly seriously.
He feels a strong dislike towards Ginius Sakhalin for his cruelty, but adores Aina Sakhalin and is like a father figure to her.
Ultimately, he grants Aina's wish by boarding his Gouf Custom and heading out on a solo mission to put up a fierce fight against the attacking Federation Forces, including the 08th MS Team.

An ace pilot of the Zeon forces who has sworn loyalty to the noble Sakhalin family.
He is in charge of defending the development base and other military duties while Ginius Sakhalin focuses on the development of his prototype mobile armor Apsaras.
He is a veteran soldier who has won the trust of others through his dedication.
Rather than a blind zealot, he is more like a samurai, taking his loyalty incredibly seriously.
He feels a strong dislike towards Ginius Sakhalin for his cruelty, but adores Aina Sakhalin and is like a father figure to her.
Ultimately, he grants Aina's wish by boarding his Gouf Custom and heading out on a solo mission to put up a fierce fight against the attacking Federation Forces, including the 08th MS Team.

A novice pilot who is assigned to the Armored Assault Force's Cyclops Team.
He goes by the nickname "Bernie."
He joins the reconnaissance of the neutral Side 6 colony Libot, but crash-lands in his first mission.
Here he meets young Alfred Izuruha, or "Al," and exchanges his military insignia for a disk that depicts the container carrying the new Gundam.
After he returns to Zeon's Granada base, he is assigned to the Cyclops Team and participates in Operation Rubicon, a plan to steal or destroy the new Gundam.
He returns to the Libot colony and encounters Al again, and because he is a kind young man, the two become friends.

A novice pilot who is assigned to the Armored Assault Force's Cyclops Team.
He goes by the nickname "Bernie."
He joins the reconnaissance of the neutral Side 6 colony Libot, but crash-lands in his first mission.
Here he meets young Alfred Izuruha, or "Al," and exchanges his military insignia for a disk that depicts the container carrying the new Gundam.
After he returns to Zeon's Granada base, he is assigned to the Cyclops Team and participates in Operation Rubicon, a plan to steal or destroy the new Gundam.
He returns to the Libot colony and encounters Al again, and because he is a kind young man, the two become friends.

Leader of the Armored Assault Force's Cyclops Team.
He is skilled in both MS and infantry combat.
A veteran soldier who is often given shady missions because of his extensive experience, he has the leadership and strength to command the ragtag Cyclops Team.
He also has cool judgment and can be unemotional when on a mission, but he cares greatly for his subordinates and is trusted by them.
He is a heavy smoker but does not smoke during operations, although he still keeps an unlit cigarette in his mouth and will even move to ash it out.

Deputy leader of the Armored Assault Force's Cyclops Team.
He is a veteran soldier who goes by the nickname "Misha."
He loves alcohol and always has a flask of whiskey around his neck when in the cockpit.
Because of this he is often chided by his team leader Hardie Steiner, but he has talent as an MS pilot.
In a team full of veterans, he is responsible for operating the Kampfer, a high-performance assault MS.

Deputy leader of the Armored Assault Force's Cyclops Team.
He is a veteran soldier who goes by the nickname "Misha."
He loves alcohol and always has a flask of whiskey around his neck when in the cockpit.
Because of this he is often chided by his team leader Hardie Steiner, but he has talent as an MS pilot.
In a team full of veterans, he is responsible for operating the Kampfer, a high-performance assault MS.

A member of the Armored Assault Force's Cyclops Team.
He has a short temper and rude manner, and has even beaten up the new pilot Bernard Wiseman.
He may have a violent streak, but when it comes to artillery and explosives, he is an exceptional soldier.
He loves bandanas and often wears them during missions.
He also enjoys adult magazines, and often has inappropriate posters pinned up in the cockpit.

A member of the Armored Assault Force's Cyclops Team.
He is a fashionable soldier who often styles his hair during operations.
He is a life-long member of special operations teams, with a lot of experience in various missions.
He is also a trusted and skilled MS pilot.

A test pilot and system engineer for the Federation Space Force's G-4 Corps.
She goes by the nickname "Chris."
She has a mild and kind personality, but also shows strength.
When it comes to her duties, she is competitive and has a strong sense of responsibility.
Her exceptional skills got her assigned to the elite Tactical Research Group.
After the Newtype MS Alex was developed and the G-4 Corps was established, she was chosen as the Alex's pilot.
The final adjustments to the Alex are to be made in her hometown, the Libot colony at Side 6.
She returns home and reencounters her childhood friend Alfred Izuruha.

Leader of an escort team attached to the Federation's Albatross transportation company. Because he caused problems with every superior officer he'd ever worked with, he was shipped off to the Gobi Desert and demoted to transportation duties.
He has a flexible mind, suggesting to a senior officer that they use the MS Pixy they were transporting to fight off an enemy attack. He is also trigger-happy, voluntarily fighting in solo battles that could have been avoided.

Leader of Zeon's 17th Special Forces Team, also known as the Wolf Gar Team. He was once a member of Kycilia Zabi's Special Service, but was demoted after being accused of participating in an anti-Zabi coup d'etat after the Battle of Loum.
He has a calm personality and is a good analyst who gives clear instructions to his subordinates, but secretly he longs to fight stronger enemies. He is a skilled Efreet pilot.

Commander of the Federation Forces' 11th Independent Mechanized Composite Corps, also known as the Guinea Pig Team. 
He is a veteran fighter pilot who participated in Operation British.
He is a skilled MS pilot and has defeated the Gundam pilot Amuro Ray in a simulator based on battle data.
He was scouted by Alph Kamra, the technical officer in charge of the Blue Destiny, and chosen as a pilot for the EXAM system test machine.
Since then he has continued to confront his fate while piloting the Blue Destiny, and has achieved great results in combat.

Commander of the Federation Forces' 11th Independent Mechanized Composite Corps, also known as the Guinea Pig Team. 
He is a veteran fighter pilot who participated in Operation British.
He is a skilled MS pilot and has defeated the Gundam pilot Amuro Ray in a simulator based on battle data.
He was scouted by Alph Kamra, the technical officer in charge of the Blue Destiny, and chosen as a pilot for the EXAM system test machine.
Since then he has continued to confront his fate while piloting the Blue Destiny, and has achieved great results in combat.

A member of the Federation Forces' 11th Independent Mechanized Composite Corps, also known as the Guinea Pig Team. He may be a big-mouthed joker, but he's also a skilled MS pilot who has so far survived the Guinea Pig Team despite its high attrition rate.He's the type of veteran who complains a lot but gets the job done.
During one operation he encountered a blue MS, resulting in his becoming involved with the events surrounding the EXAM system, along with his comrade Yuu Kajima.

A member of the Federation Forces' 11th Independent Mechanized Composite Corps, also known as the Guinea Pig Team.
He is earnest to a fault and that sometimes makes him inflexible, but he sticks to the basics when it comes to piloting and has so far survived the Guinea Pig Team despite its high attrition rate.
During one operation he encountered a blue MS, resulting in his becoming involved with the events surrounding the EXAM system, along with his comrade Yuu Kajima.

The Federation Forces technical officer in charge of the Blue Destiny, an EXAM system test machine. He has a rough manner that makes him appear cold to others, but his intentions are good.
When Chlust Moses defected from the Zeon forces, he assisted in his research and helped him complete the Blue Destiny Unit 1.
He then chose Yuu Kajima, commander of the 11th Independent Mechanized Composite Corps, as its pilot, showing dedication to his research subject but little interest in anything else.
Even after the completion of the Blue Destiny, he continues his research for the EXAM system, collecting data on prototype testing.

A proud, ruthless, and belligerent MS pilot of the Zeon forces, he often looks down on others and belittles the Federation's soldiers.
He may have a volatile personality, but his skills are superb and he's dubbed himself the "Knight of Zeon", earning himself many fans among his fellow soldiers.
He was the test pilot for the EXAM system test machine Efreet Custom until Chlust took the research material and defected to the Federation. He then vowed to destroy the traitor Chlust and take back the EXAM system by any means necessary.

A Newtype girl used for EXAM system experiments by Chlust Moses, who was like a father to her.
She had a kind personality and wished for peace, joining Chlust in his research because she agreed with his philosophy of preventing Newtypes from being used in war.
However, she was rendered permanently unconscious by an accident during an EXAM system experiment.

An ace pilot of the Federation Space Force's Moore Brotherhood mothership, the Beehive. He holds the rank of Ensign. 
Born the son of the former head of Side 4, which was destroyed during the One Year War, he is a childhood friend of Beehive's acting captain Claudia and mechanic Cornelius. 
The Beehive, tasked with wiping out the Zeon remnants hiding in Thunderbolt Sector, launched multiple assaults but were repelled each time, losing commanders one after another.
Ensign Io, now the highest-ranking Mobile Suit pilot, is selected to pilot the Full Armor Gundam. He hates the idea of being tied down to his hometown or family lineage and has a fearless personality. 
A jazz enthusiast, Io plays music in his cockpit even in the thick of battle, his enemies dreading the thought of hearing it over contact communication in their destroyed mobile suits.

An ace pilot of the Federation Space Force's Moore Brotherhood mothership, the Beehive. He holds the rank of Ensign. 
Born the son of the former head of Side 4, which was destroyed during the One Year War, he is a childhood friend of Beehive's acting captain Claudia and mechanic Cornelius. 
The Beehive, tasked with wiping out the Zeon remnants hiding in Thunderbolt Sector, launched multiple assaults but were repelled each time, losing commanders one after another.
Ensign Io, now the highest-ranking Mobile Suit pilot, is selected to pilot the Full Armor Gundam. He hates the idea of being tied down to his hometown or family lineage and has a fearless personality. 
A jazz enthusiast, Io plays music in his cockpit even in the thick of battle, his enemies dreading the thought of hearing it over contact communication in their destroyed mobile suits.

A female officer and acting captain of the Beehive. She holds the rank of Lieutenant Commander. Born on Moore, she is childhood friends with Io and Cornelius. When her former superior is killed in action, she takes command of the operation to retake Thunderbolt Sector. However, the pressure is too much for Claudia, and she resorts to drug abuse. Io criticizes her harshly for showing such weakness, but Cornelius provides earnest advice to help her recover. She is in a relationship with Io, but as the war continues to worsen, the cracks in their relationship do as well. Claudia's mental state spirals further when she discovers that the supplemental pilots sent along with their supplies are only young students.

A Zeon Mobile Suit pilot. He was ranked Sergeant Major and then later promoted to Ensign. After losing both legs in battle, he was assigned to the Living Dead Division's Dried Fish, and became the division's ace sniper.
He also assisted Professor Karla with her research on the Reuse P Device.
Making full use of the debris map of Thunderbolt Sector, he was able to accurately predict the trajectory of enemy units even while under under heavy radio interference due to Minovsky Particle density, achieving great success in battle.
Before long, Daryl was chosen to pilot the Psycho Zaku equipped with the Reuse P Device, and subsequently faces a life-and-death struggle against Io, the pilot of the Earth Federation Force's Full Armor Gundam.
He loves pop music and brings a radio into his cockpit to listen during battle.

A Zeon Mobile Suit pilot. He was ranked Sergeant Major and then later promoted to Ensign. After losing both legs in battle, he was assigned to the Living Dead Division's Dried Fish, and became the division's ace sniper.
He also assisted Professor Karla with her research on the Reuse P Device.
Making full use of the debris map of Thunderbolt Sector, he was able to accurately predict the trajectory of enemy units even while under under heavy radio interference due to Minovsky Particle density, achieving great success in battle.
Before long, Daryl was chosen to pilot the Psycho Zaku equipped with the Reuse P Device, and subsequently faces a life-and-death struggle against Io, the pilot of the Earth Federation Force's Full Armor Gundam.
He loves pop music and brings a radio into his cockpit to listen during battle.

A Zeon Mobile Suit pilot. He was ranked Sergeant Major and then later promoted to Ensign. After losing both legs in battle, he was assigned to the Living Dead Division's Dried Fish, and became the division's ace sniper.
He also assisted Professor Karla with her research on the Reuse P Device.
Making full use of the debris map of Thunderbolt Sector, he was able to accurately predict the trajectory of enemy units even while under under heavy radio interference due to Minovsky Particle density, achieving great success in battle.
Before long, Daryl was chosen to pilot the Psycho Zaku equipped with the Reuse P Device, and subsequently faces a life-and-death struggle against Io, the pilot of the Earth Federation Force's Full Armor Gundam.
He loves pop music and brings a radio into his cockpit to listen during battle.

A female professor aboard the Dried Fish who works on prosthetics and is entrusted with providing prosthetic limbs to wounded soldiers. She was in love with Daryl's Mobile Suit team leader, Hoover. After Hoover was killed by Io from the Earth Federation, she asked Daryl to take revenge for her. She was forced to cooperate with the Reuse P Device research to save her father, who was a historian and political criminal imprisoned in the heart of Zeon.

A Mobile Suit pilot belonging to the Living Dead Division. He holds the rank of Sergeant Major and pilots a Zaku II. Although he has prosthetic arms, he has a cheerful personality and courage to spare. A member of Daryl's Mobile Suit team in Thunderbolt Sector, he was shot down by the Full Armor Gundam and is currently missing.

A Mobile Suit pilot belonging to the Living Dead Division. He holds the rank of Sergeant Major and pilots a Rick Dom. He has prosthetic legs from the thighs down. He is an emotional and compassionate man who is both grateful and sorry for Daryl's decision to test the Reuse P Device. Many of his comrades have been lost in the battles against the Beehive.

Captain of the Living Dead Division's mothership, the Dried Fish. He wears a hook prosthetic on his right hand. To counter the Full Armor Gundam deployed to the frontlines by the Moore Brotherhood, he decides to use the Psycho Zaku, a high-mobility Zaku II equipped with the Reuse P Device. For this purpose, he asks Daryl, a prospective pilot, to undergo further trials. He is also the one who named the Psycho Zaku.

A high-school student whose real name is Amate Yuzuriha. 
Machu has always felt that her daily life in a peaceful colony was somehow false. After meeting Nyaan, she becomes the pilot of the GQuuuuuuX and begins participating in Clan Battle.

A mysterious boy who appears before Machu and Nyaan.
Shuji is wanted by the military police for painting graffiti all over the outer walls of the colony.
He participates in Clan Battle in order to earn money for a certain purpose, and becomes Machu's Mav.
Zeon Major, later Captain. An ace pilot also known as "The Red Comet."
Former Earth Federation Forces pilot. A super unicum who brought down more than 100 units in the One Year War.
A member of Dormitory Security. Former Earth Federation Forces pilot.
Former lieutenant in the Principality of Zeon forces. During the One Year War, he gained fame alongside Ortega and Mash as one of the "Black Tri-Stars."
Former lieutenant junior grade in the Principality of Zeon forces. One of the "Black Tri-Stars" who played a key role in the One Year War.
An ensign in the Earth Federation forces. Assigned to the Murasame Laboratory.
A lieutenant in the Earth Federation forces. Assigned to the Augusta Laboratory.
An ensign in the Principality of Zeon forces, who graduated head of his class from the Flanagan School.
A lieutenant in the Principality of Zeon forces. He was the captain of the Jupiter fleet.

A courier who smuggles illegal goods.
When Nyaan's homeland was turned into a battlefield and she became a refugee, she escaped her colony alone in a petit mobile suit, with no time to even check on the safety of her family.
Luckily, she was picked up by a ship and brought to a colony that Machu lives. Her highest priority is her own survival.

A test pilot assigned to the Federation Forces' Torrington base after graduating from the Nijmegen Military Academy.
When the Torrington base was attacked by the Delaz Fleet, he climbed aboard the Gundam GP01 to retrieve the stolen Gundam GP02, and thus became a Gundam pilot.
He loves MS, and this shaped his decision to become a MS pilot. 
He has a full understanding of the mecha he pilots, making him the perfect pilot for a prototype machine as special as the Gundam.
He has a laid back personality, is timid around women, and has a childish dislike of carrots. But he also has quick judgment, good observational skills, and skill at accurately predicting the future.
Although at first he was immature both in mind and technique, he gradually overcame this through experiencing the deaths of comrades, meeting new people, and fighting.

A test pilot assigned to the Federation Forces' Torrington base after graduating from the Nijmegen Military Academy. 
He is a school friend of Kou Uraki.
When the Torrington base was attacked by the Delaz Fleet, Kou became the pilot of the Gundam GP01. 
Chuck joined the mobile suit team of the Federation warship Albion to support Kou, and thus became a pilot of the GM Cannon II.
He is a bright and flirtatious man who enjoys talking to women. Initially his piloting skills were passable at best, but as he gained more combat experience, he grew to top-tier.
He is a great support to Kou Uraki, both professionally and personally.

Leader of the "Immortal 04th MS Team" during the One Year War, he is a stalwart veteran and a father figure to young pilots such as Kou Uraki, who all strive to be like him.
After the One Year War, he commands the MS test pilots at the Torrington base. He is ordered by Eyphar Sinapus, captain of the warship Albion, to look after the Albion's MS pilots who had been ordered to retrieve the Gundam GP02 stolen by the Federation Forces.
He is an excellent soldier and commander, greatly trusted by his subordinates.
A seasoned pilot, he still fights on the front lines with his comrades, but recently he has started to feel his age.
His personal life is somewhat complicated: he has a wife on Earth, but apparently has girlfriends elsewhere.

A veteran pilot who served under South Burning as part of the "Immortal 04th MS Team" during the One Year War. 
He is sent to the Federation Forces' Torrington base as a supplemental pilot for the warship Albion, where he and the rest of the crew have the dangerous mission of recapturing the prototype Gundam GP02 from the Delaz Fleet.
He is quick to anger, and when he first joins the Albion, he is named a troublemaker along with his fellow supplemental pilot Bernard Monsha. However, after South Burning's death, he is given a battlefield promotion to the rank of Lieutenant and becomes the company commander of Albion's MS pilot team.

A veteran pilot who served under South Burning as part of the "Immortal 04th MS Team" during the One Year War. 
He is sent to the Federation Forces' Torrington base as a supplemental pilot for the warship Albion, where he and the rest of the crew have the dangerous mission of recapturing the prototype Gundam GP02 from the Delaz Fleet.
He has a tendency to flirt outrageously with women, and is also a sarcastic and vengeful person with many personality flaws.
In an attempt to get the attention of Nina Purpleton, he challenges Kou Uraki for the position of Gundam GP01 pilot, but loses after grossly misjudging Kou's combat ability.
This is one of several times when his overconfident side comes out.
Still, his skills as a pilot are substantial, and he serves with the Albion's mobile suit team until the end of the Delaz Conflict.

A veteran pilot who served under South Burning as part of the "Immortal 04th MS Team" during the One Year War.
He is sent to the Federation Forces' Torrington base as a supplemental pilot for the warship Albion, where he and the rest of the crew have the dangerous mission of recapturing the prototype Gundam GP02 from the Delaz Fleet.
He is a warm and considerate person who is good at organizing people. Compared to his One Year War comrades, Bernard Monsha and Alpha A. Bait, he has a less demanding personality.
A skilled pilot, he fights as part of the Albion's mobile suit team until the end of the Delaz Conflict.

Captain of the Federation Forces assault landing ship
Albion. He has a slightly short temper, but on the whole is
a calm veteran with many years of leadership experience.
He has excellent observational skills and insight, honed
through years of fierce battles. He is able to see through
to the enemy's intentions and take his own actions with
flexibility, but this causes clashes with his superiors.

An officer in the Delaz Fleet.
He is an ace pilot of the Zeon forces who was feared as the "Nightmare of Solomon" during the One Year War.
Talented enough to get into the modern history books, he is best known for attacking the Federation Forces' Torrington base and stealing the Gundam GP02.
Popular among subordinates and comrades, his proud spirit and nobility give him the bearing and personality of a warrior. 
The same traits cause him to dislike fellow Delaz Fleet officer Cima Garahau, who has a dark side.
He is also an idealist who has a naive infatuation with the Delaz Fleet leader Aiguille Delaz.
During the Delaz Conflict, he puts his life on the line to realize the dream that Operation Stardust represents.

Zeon forces who was feared as the "Nightmare of Solomon"
during the One Year War.
Talented enough to get into the modern history books, he is
best known for attacking the Federation Forces' Torrington
base and stealing the Gundam GP02.

He is also an idealist who has a naive infatuation with the

realize the dream that Operation Stardust represents.

Zeon forces who was feared as the "Nightmare of Solomon"
